text.title: Dynamic Application Security Testing (DAST) in CI/CD Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pick-tool
step.action: ZAP for general automation, Nuclei for CVE / misconfig templating, Burp for manual pen tests.

step.name: stand-up-scope-file
step.action: Author `.zap/rules.tsv` (or Nuclei target list) with explicit denies for payment / email / third-party.

step.name: wire-auth
step.action: Configure form-auth / OAuth / API-key per the recipe; verify scanner can reach authenticated routes.

step.name: schedule
step.action: Add post-deploy trigger + nightly (or weekly) cron.

step.name: upload-sarif
step.action: Run scanner → emit SARIF → upload via codeql-action/upload-sarif@v3.
step.output: Findings visible in GitHub Security tab
